benchmark.description: ORP calculation accuracy over 50 edge-case words covering hyphenated, quoted, alphanumeric, symbolic, and empty tokens. Script outputs a float in [0.0, 1.0] to stdout. Run from lab root: python3 test_orp_engine.py
benchmark.mutation_constraint: Mutate strictly ONE variable or logic block per iteration to maintain scientific rigor

evaluations.prompt: Speed read my file notes.md at 300 WPM.
Convert report.md into an RSVP token stream at 500 WPM with ORP alignment.
Read chapter 3 of my book.epub in RSVP mode at 400 words per minute.
Flash-read these paragraphs at 250 WPM with sentence-end pauses.
Generate an RSVP stream from presentation.txt for speed reading practice.
Speed-read this document using the Spritz ORP algorithm.
Apply Rapid Serial Visual Presentation to my lecture notes.
What are some good speed reading tips and techniques?
Can you summarize this report.pdf for me?
Find code related to authentication in the repository.
What is the word count of my essay?
Format this text as a bulleted list.
Check the grammar in this paragraph.
